Hero.welcomeSub: Experience genuine hospitality and modern comfort in the heart of Fergana. Merhaba Hotel — a place you will want to return to.

Booking.bookSubtext: Fill in your details and our reservations team will confirm your stay within 2 hours.
Booking.luxurySubtitle: Quality and Comfort for Every Guest

About.description1: Merhaba Hotel was founded with a clear purpose: to offer every guest a warm welcome, a well-appointed room, and attentive service. Located in a convenient part of Fergana city, we are a natural choice for both business travelers and those visiting for leisure.
About.description2: Each of our 87 rooms is designed with care — comfortable beds, quality linens, modern amenities, and a calm atmosphere that lets you rest and recharge. At Merhaba, we believe good hospitality is about the details that make you feel at home.

Location.subtext: Our hotel is conveniently located in the heart of Fergana city, near major attractions and main transport arteries. You can easily reach us by car, taxi or public transport. Use the map to build the most convenient route.

AboutPage.title: About Merhaba Hotel
AboutPage.welcome:
Welcome to Merhaba Hotel, where every guest feels special. Our hotel combines comfort, modern style and high standards of service, creating a unique atmosphere for leisure and business trips. We are located in the city center, which makes Merhaba Hotel a convenient choice for both tourists and business travelers.

Our rooms are designed with care for your needs: from the functional Classic rooms to the spacious Superior King, each equipped with everything necessary for a comfortable stay — comfortable furniture, modern amenities and a stylish interior.

At Merhaba Hotel, we make sure that your stay is pleasant and carefree. We offer a 24-hour front desk, high-speed Wi-Fi throughout, a buffet breakfast, and convenient areas for work and recreation. Our team is always ready to help make your stay truly memorable.
AboutPage.early1: From 00:00 to 05:59 — an additional payment of 100% of the cost per night.
AboutPage.early2: From 06:00 to 13:59 — additional payment of 50% of the cost per night.
AboutPage.late1: From 12:01 to 17:59 — additional payment of 50% of the cost per night.
AboutPage.late2: From 18:00 to 23:59 — an additional payment of 100% of the cost per night.
AboutPage.contactAdmin: For early check-in or late check-out, please contact the administrator.
AboutPage.cancellationText: To clarify the conditions and cancellation procedures, please contact the administrator. We will be happy to provide you with all the necessary information and help you with the cancellation process.

NewsPage.title: News & Events
NewsPage.subtitle: Our latest updates, achievements, and announcements.

management-certificate.title: Merhaba Hotel Receives ISO 9001:2015 Management System Certificate
management-certificate.excerpt: Merhaba Hotel has been awarded the O’z DSt ISO 9001:2015 Management System Certificate (Registry No: UZ.SMT.04.0013).
management-certificate.content:
Merhaba Hotel is proud to announce that it has been awarded the O’z DSt ISO 9001:2015 Management System Certificate, confirming that the hotel’s management system meets internationally recognized quality standards.

The certificate was issued under the National Certification System of the Republic of Uzbekistan and is registered under Registry No: UZ.SMT.04.0013. It applies to the hotel’s hospitality and management services.

This achievement reflects Merhaba Hotel’s ongoing commitment to consistent service quality, efficient management, and guest satisfaction. We sincerely thank our team and partners whose dedication made this milestone possible.

Gastrobar.title: Gastrobar
Gastrobar.subtitle: Good Food in a Relaxed Atmosphere
Gastrobar.breakfastDesc: Start your day with a delicious and varied buffet breakfast. Every day we offer a wide selection of fresh dishes: hot dishes, fresh vegetables and fruits, pastries, cereals, yoghurts and much more. Whatever your preferences, you will find something to enjoy. Breakfast is available to all guests and is served in a welcoming atmosphere.
Gastrobar.discountDesc: Book a room on our official website and get a 10% discount at the hotel's main restaurant. Enjoy good food and a pleasant atmosphere — the offer is valid only for guests who have made a reservation online.
Gastrobar.exquisiteDesc: A comfortable setting for your dining experience.

Spa.title: Fitness & SPA
Spa.subtitle: Stay Active, Rest Well
Spa.poolDesc: Relax and unwind in our modern indoor pool. The comfortable water temperature and calm atmosphere make it a great place to rest at any time of year. The pool is open to all hotel guests, but access is only available upon prior reservation to ensure comfort and privacy.
Spa.fitnessDesc: Keep up with your workout routine even while traveling. Our fitness room is equipped with everything you need for an effective session, from cardio machines to free weights. The spacious and bright room is available throughout the day.

Meetings.title: Meetings & Events
Meetings.subtitle: Professional Spaces for Every Occasion
Meetings.conferenceDesc: Flexible spaces suited for business meetings, seminars, and private events. From small group sessions to larger gatherings, our rooms are equipped with the technology and support you need. We offer 22, 32, and 52-person conference rooms.

GeneralServices.title: Services & Amenities
GeneralServices.subtitle: Your Comfort is Our Priority
GeneralServices.laundryDesc: We offer laundry and ironing services for your convenience. Fast and reliable, so your clothes are always ready when you need them. To place an order and confirm the cost, please contact the administrator.
GeneralServices.billiardDesc: Enjoy a game of billiards in the comfortable surroundings of our hotel. A great way to relax after a busy day or spend an evening with friends.
GeneralServices.parkingDesc: Free parking for our hotel guests.
GeneralServices.gastrobarDesc: Quality cuisine and a comfortable atmosphere for your dining experience.
GeneralServices.spaDesc: Modern equipment and a well-equipped fitness area for your workouts.
GeneralServices.meetingsDesc: Fully equipped conference rooms for business meetings and events.
GeneralServices.breakfastDesc: Start your day with a delicious and varied buffet breakfast! Every day we offer a wide selection of fresh dishes — hot options, fresh vegetables and fruit, pastries, cereals, yogurts and more — served in a cozy setting to give you the perfect start to the day.

breakfast.title: Buffet Breakfast
breakfast.description: Start your day with a rich buffet breakfast featuring a wide choice of local and international dishes, served fresh every morning in a cozy setting.

wifi.title: High-speed Wi-Fi
wifi.description: Fast, reliable Wi-Fi throughout the hotel — stay connected for work or leisure from your room and every common area.

parking.title: Free Parking

laundry.title: Laundry Service
laundry.description: Fast and reliable laundry and ironing so your clothes are always ready. Contact the front desk to arrange and confirm pricing.

amenities.title: Amenities
amenities.description: Practical and comfortable in-room features for a pleasant stay. From smart home systems to quality toiletries, we cover everything you need.

guest_services.title: Guest Services
guest_services.description: We make your stay easier with laundry service, 24-hour housekeeping, and a 10% restaurant discount for guests who book directly through our website.
